name: git_status
description: Show working tree status: current branch, staged changes, unstaged changes, and untracked files.

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

count.description: Number of commits to show (e.g. 10). Defaults to 10 if omitted.

skip.description: Skip N commits before starting output (e.g. 10 to skip the first 10 commits).

oneline.description: Use compact one-line format per commit

ref.description: Commit, branch, or ref to show history for (e.g. 'main', 'HEAD~5..HEAD')

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

path.description: Limit log to commits affecting this file or directory path, relative to the repository root

name: git_diff
description: Show differences between working tree, index, or commits.

staged.description: Show staged changes (index vs HEAD) instead of unstaged changes

ref.description: Compare against a specific commit, branch, or ref (e.g. 'main', 'HEAD~3')

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

path.description: Limit diff to a specific file or directory path, relative to the repository root

name: git_diff_lines
description: Read a range of lines from a git diff output.

start_line.description: Line number to start reading at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end reading at (1-indexed, inclusive). When omitted, reads from start_line to the end of the output.

staged.description: Show staged changes (index vs HEAD) instead of unstaged changes

ref.description: Compare against a specific commit, branch, or ref (e.g. 'main', 'HEAD~3')

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

path.description: Limit diff to a specific file or directory path, relative to the repository root

name: git_show
description: Show the contents of a specific commit (message, author, diff).

ref.description: Commit hash, branch name, tag, or ref to show (e.g. 'HEAD', 'main')

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: git_show_lines
description: Read a range of lines from a git show output.

start_line.description: Line number to start reading at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end reading at (1-indexed, inclusive). When omitted, reads from start_line to the end of the output.

ref.description: Commit hash, branch name, tag, or ref to show (e.g. 'HEAD', 'main')

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: git_branch
description: List branches. Shows branches with the current branch marked.

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: git_add
description: Stage files for the next commit.

paths.description: File path or pattern to stage, relative to the repository root. Space-separated for multiple files. Use '.' to stage all unstaged changes.

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

paths.description: File path or pattern to unstage, relative to the repository root. Space-separated for multiple files. Use '.' to unstage all staged changes.

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: git_commit
description: Create a new commit with staged changes.

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: git_branch_create
description: Create a new branch and switch to it.

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.
Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

force.description: Force-delete the branch (git branch -D). Default: false.

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: git_merge
description: Merge a branch into the current branch.

squash.description: Squash the branch's commits into a single staged change

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: git_rebase
description: Rebase the current branch onto another branch or ref. Replays the current branch's commits on top of the target. Also continue or abort an in-progress rebase.

onto.description: The branch or ref to rebase onto (e.g. 'main', 'feat/add-search')

continue.description: Continue an in-progress rebase after resolving conflicts

abort.description: Abort an in-progress rebase and restore the original branch state

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: git_cherry_pick
description: Apply the changes introduced by specific commits onto the current branch. Defaults to creating a new commit for each picked commit. Also continue or abort an in-progress cherry-pick.

commits.description: One or more commit hashes to cherry-pick (space-separated for multiple, e.g. 'abc1234' or 'abc1234 def5678')

continue.description: Continue an in-progress cherry-pick after resolving conflicts

abort.description: Abort an in-progress cherry-pick and restore the original branch state

repo.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.
